nasb.text: My mind reels, horror overwhelms me; The twilight I longed for has been turned for me into trembling.

esv.text: My heart staggers; horror has appalled me; the twilight I longed for has been turned for me into trembling.

cnv.text: 我的心迷糊，驚恐威嚇著我； 我所愛慕的黃昏，竟使我戰兢。

ccb.text: 我心慌意乱，惊惧不堪， 我期盼的黄昏却令我恐惧。

csbs.text: 我的心慌乱， 恐怖惊扰着我， 我所爱慕的黄昏竟使我恐惧。
